title: Tears Of Fantasy
description: dinosaurs, hybrids, monsters, creatures, mobs, fantasy, dimensions, biomes
body:
-THE MOD REQUIERES GECKOLIB- 
[Geckolib Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/version/LwI6czff)
![big dinos](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1319164311393796157/1395193615206056058/image.png?ex=6886150f&is=6884c38f&hm=80fe108d193efe985ca4f95a238611598a92699bc8579a876956006b4dfc5c6c&=&format=webp&quality=lossless)


a mod that adds a section of new dinosaur-themed mobs which are based on different species, also adding a new repertoire of armor and weapons to face these new mobs, some hostile, others peaceful and others neutral
. THIS MOD ADDS =
1. New Dinosaurs for minecraft
2. New Armors and Weapons to battle the new mobs
3. New Loots and Recipes
4. New Bosses
5. And New Villages (soon)
6. New Fantasy Mobs
7. New Final Bosses
8. MORE

.Compatibility.
This mod is compatible with other dinosaurs mods like =
> The Dawn Era
> Alex`s Caves (Primordial Caves)
> Ancient Nature (soon)
> Wan's Ancient Beasts
> Unusual Prehistory
> Unearthed Journe
> ETC
